calendar.matters:
HEARING RE: SURPLUS FUNDS FROM PROCEEDS
Off Calendar Sep-23-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Jarrad Wood; 213-269-6557; appearing as counsel for Claimant Franchise Tax Board.

Hearing held. Mr. Wood explains to the court that he has been unable to locate any other interested parties or other possible claimants. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows:

CLAIMANT FRANCHISE TAX BOARD'S CLAIM TO SURPLUS FUNDS is granted.

Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

HEARING RE: SURPLUS FUNDS FROM PROCEEDS
Off Calendar Sep-06-2024 Continued To Sep-23-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: HEARING RE: SURPLUS FUNDS FROM PROCEEDS.

Appearances: Jarrad Wood of the Department of Justice (213.269.6557) for claimant the Franchise Tax Board; No other appearances.

Discussed. The Court continues the matter to September 23, 2024, for Mr. Wood to investigate whether the former trustor, Bert Gabriel, (or anyone of their behalf, e.g. estate) filed taxes since 2020 and whether the claimant is in possession of a new or different address for the former trustor. Court to provide notice of the continuance. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deposit Surplus Funds Pursuant To Civil Code 2924j And To Discharge Petitioner
Off Calendar Apr-11-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PETITIONER QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORP.'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO DEPOSIT SURPLUS FUNDS PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE 2924J AND TO DISCHARGE PETITIONER is GRANTED as requested. Petitioner shall deposit the surplus funds forthwith and shall be thereafter discharged.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deposit Surplus Funds Pursuant To Civil Code 2924j And To Discharge Petitioner
Off Calendar Apr-03-2024 Continued To Apr-11-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PETITIONER QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORP.'s Motion To Deposit Surplus Funds Pursuant To Civil Code 2924j And To Discharge Petitioner.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Transferred to be heard in department 501 on April 11, 2024, at 9:30 a.m. That department handles all foreclosure related cases per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
